title: September 20
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}
'''September 20''' is the 263rd day of the year (264th in leap years). There are 102 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[Steve Gerber]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Ben Edlund]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Tom Root]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Enuka Okuma]] is born.
*1976 – [[Michael Kogge]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 33|''Star Wars Weekly'' 33]] published.
*[[1986]] – "[[Home Is Where the Shrieks Are]]" and "[[Princess Latara]]" air on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*[[2000]] – Filming for [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']] finishes.
*2000 – [[Jedi Council: Acts of War 4|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 4]] published.
*[[2004]] – ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]'' released for the PC, Xbox, and PS2 platforms.
*[[2006]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 8|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 8]] published.
*[[2007]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 20|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 20]] published.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.38]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[Death Star]] DLC released for ''[[Star Wars Battlefront]]''.
*2016 – ''[[Star Wars Vol. 1]]'' hardcover published.
*[[2017]] – [[Poe Dameron 19|''Poe Dameron'' 19]] published.
*2017 – [[Captain Phasma 2|''Captain Phasma'' 2]] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars Annual (2015) 3|''Star Wars Annual'' (2015) 3]] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 2|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 2]] published.
*[[2022]] – ''[[T0-B1: The Droid Who Became a Jedi]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – [[Bounty Hunters 38|''Bounty Hunters'' 38]] published.
*2023 – [[Dark Droids: D-Squad 1|''Dark Droids: D-Squad'' 1]] published.
*[[2024]] – "[[The Great Gomgourd Quest / A Sticky Situation]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
<noinclude>
